wave/open.name: open
wave/open.description: If file is a string, open the file by that name, otherwise treat it as a file-like object. mode can be: 'rb'Read only mode. 'wb'Write only mode. Note that it does not allow read/write WAV files. A mode of 'rb' returns a Wave_read object, while a mode of 'wb' returns a Wave_write object. If mode is omitted and a file-like object is passed as file, file.mode is used as the default value for mode. If you pass in a file-like object, the wave object will not close it when its close() method is cal...
